Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson

Class BsonSerializerSession

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ContextSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingTraverseSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.SerializerSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.OutputStreamSerializerSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson.BsonSerializerSession
All Implemented Interfaces:
BeanSession, ConverterSession, ArrayRecordWritable, RecordWritable
public class BsonSerializerSession extends OutputStreamSerializerSession implements RecordWritable, ArrayRecordWritable
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of BsonSerializer.
Notes:
  • This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • BsonSerializerSession

      protected BsonSerializerSession(BsonSerializerSession.Builder builder)

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static BsonSerializerSession.Builder create(BsonSerializer ctx)
      Creates a new builder for this object.
      Parameters:
      ctx - The context creating this session.
      Returns:
      A new builder.

    • serializeRecords

      public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException
      Opens a whole-value push generator targeting BSON output, bound to this live session. write(Object) delegates to SerializerSession.serialize(Object, Object).
      Specified by:
      serializeRecords in interface RecordWritable
      Parameters:
      output - The output.
      Returns:
      A new RecordWriter.
      Throws:
      IOException - If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.

    • serializeArrayRecords

      public RecordWriter serializeArrayRecords(Object output) throws IOException
      Buffered array-element RecordWriter for BSON, bound to this live session. BSON's wire format requires the entire document byte-length up front (length prefix at every nesting level), so streaming without buffering is not possible.
      Specified by:
      serializeArrayRecords in interface ArrayRecordWritable
      Parameters:
      output - The output.
      Returns:
      A buffered RecordWriter.
      Throws:
      IOException - If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.

    • isRecordStreaming

      public boolean isRecordStreaming()
      The BSON record writer is buffered/RecordAdapter-backed, not O(1) streaming.
      Specified by:
      isRecordStreaming in interface RecordWritable
      Returns:
      Always false.

    • isArrayRecordStreaming

      public boolean isArrayRecordStreaming()
      The BSON array-record writer is buffered/RecordAdapter-backed, not O(1) streaming.
      Specified by:
      isArrayRecordStreaming in interface ArrayRecordWritable
      Returns:
      Always false.

    • doSerialize

      protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe out, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException
      Description copied from class: SerializerSession
      Serializes a POJO to the specified pipe.

      This method should NOT close the context object.

      The default implementation of this method simply calls Serializer.doSerialize(SerializerSession,SerializerPipe,Object).

      Overrides:
      doSerialize in class SerializerSession
      Parameters:
      out - Where to send the output from the serializer.
      o - The object to serialize.
      Throws:
      IOException - Thrown by underlying stream.
      SerializeException - Problem occurred trying to serialize object.
